name: ExtensionEvidence_Statistic_AttributeEstimate
title: R5: An attribute of the Statistic (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Evidence.statistic.attributeEstimate` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Evidence.statistic.attributeEstimate` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Evidence.statistic.attributeEstimate` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4B: `Evidence.statistic.attributeEstimate` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Evidence.statistic.attributeEstimate` is part of an existing definition because parent element `Evidence.statistic` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `Evidence.statistic.attributeEstimate` has a context of Evidence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Evidence`.
Element `Evidence.statistic.attributeEstimate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Creating extension because element `Evidence.statistic.attributeEstimate` is a content reference and requires an extesion definition.
